name: 标点符号
subject: english
domain_name: 语法与词汇 / Grammar & Vocabulary / Grammar & Vocabulary
curriculum_points: • 6Rg.01 Explore in texts, and understand, the uses of colons, semi-colons, ellipses, parenthetic commas, dashes and brackets.
• 6Wg.01 Use commas, dashes and brackets parenthetically.
• 6Wg.02 Punctuate direct and reported speech accurately.
• 6Wg.03 Use punctuation effectively to clarify meaning in complex sentences.
